title: Hubbell Incorporated (HUBB) CEO Gerben Bakker on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE:HUBB ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 26, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Gerben Bakker - Chairman, President & CEO Bill Sperry - EVP & CFO Dan Innamorato - VP, IR Conference Call Participants Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Partners Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Tommy Moll - Stephens Inc. Nigel Edward Coe - Wolfe Research, LLC Chris Snyder - UBS Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Christopher Glynn - Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the First Quarter 2022 Results Conference Call.

title: Why Hubbell (HUBB) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: Hubbell (HUBB) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Hubbell (HUBB) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: Hubbell (HUBB) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Hubbell Incorporated to Announce First Quarter 2022 Results on April 26, 2022
text: Shelton, CT, April 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) today announced it will release its first quarter 2022 financial results prior to the opening of the market on April 26, 2022. The Company will then webcast its Analysts' Conference Call to discuss the results at 10:00 AM ET.
